Religion can be important, as it often fosters community and moral cohesion among believers.
Religion can offer moral guidance and community cohesion, which may help stabilize societies. However, a good society can also thrive on secular values like human rights, rule of law, and empathy.
(a) — it’s an important component of a good society.
